overview.description: The ProShares Short FTSE China 50 (YXI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index comprising 50 of the largest and most liquid Chinese stocks listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. YXI was launched on Mar 18, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD Index
